name: @northkeep/platform-mobile
description: React Native / Expo platform adapters for NorthKeep core: react-native-libsodium + react-native-quick-crypto crypto, expo-sqlite driver, expo-file-system atomic storage, expo-secure-store device secret

northkeepDevicePeers.//: Runtime requirements of the consuming Expo app (apps/mobile declares the real versions). Deliberately NOT peerDependencies: pnpm's autoInstallPeers would drag the whole React Native / Expo native tree into the desktop monorepo install, and react-native-libsodium's build script cannot run here. Compilation is decoupled via src/rn-modules.d.ts; the Node byte-exact suite uses the wasm stand-ins below.
northkeepDevicePeers.//buffer: The adapters return Node Buffers (the CryptoProvider/VaultStorage contract mandates Buffer). Hermes has no global Buffer, so apps/mobile MUST install a Buffer polyfill (e.g. the one react-native-quick-crypto ships, or @craftzdog/react-native-buffer) and register it globally in the Metro entry before constructing the platform. See ADR 0021.
